description: Perform terrain analysis on the Digital Elevation Model (DEM) located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/rasters/bay_area_dem.tif. Generate a Hillshade map with an Azimuth of 315 and Altitude of 45, saving the result to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/hillshade.tif. Generate a Slope map in degrees and save it to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/slope.tif. Save the final QGIS project as terrain_analysis.qgz in /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/.
